mapper.select: SELECT entrust_id entrustId, entrust_number entrustNumber, entrust_type entrustType, entrust_company_id entrustCompanyId, witness_company_name witnessCompanyName, project_id projectId, project_part projectPart, sample_receive_way sampleReceiveWay, check_purpose checkPurpose, report_num reportNum, report_get_way reportGetWay, entrust_note entrustNote, entrust_data entrustData FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT T1.product_id productId, T2.product_name productName, T1.standard standard, T1.model_id model, T1.product_number batch, T1.object_count sampleCount, T1.product_company_name vendor, T1.sampleType sampleType FROM ( SELECT product_id, '依据' standard, model_id, product_number, object_count, product_company_name, '样品类型' sampleType FROM jt_sample_object WHERE sample_object_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT sample_Id FROM jt_entrust_check_item WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId} ) ) T1 LEFT JOIN d_product_msg T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id

SELECT T1.product_id productId, T2.check_item_name checkItemName, CONCAT( T3.check_basis_doc_name, ',', T3.check_basis_code ) standard, T1.check_times checkTimes FROM jt_entrust_check_item T1 LEFT JOIN d_product_check_item T2 ON T1.check_item_id = T2.check_item_id LEFT JOIN s_check_basis_code T3 ON T1.standard_id = T3.check_basis_id WHERE T1.entrust_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT T1.check_item_id itemId, T1.check_item_name itemName, T2.cost itemCost FROM d_product_check_item T1 LEFT JOIN d_product_cost T2 ON T1.check_item_id = T2.check_item_id WHERE is_valid = 1 AND T1.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT T1.check_basis_id value, CONCAT(T2.check_basis_doc_name,',',T2.check_basis_code) text FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT check_basis_id FROM d_product_check_basis_info WHERE product_id = #{productId} ) T1 LEFT JOIN s_check_basis_code T2 ON T1.check_basis_id = T2.check_basis_id

select DISTINCT a.sample_id As sampleId,a.sample_number As sampleCode,jri.flow_status As reportStat from jt_sample_info a inner join jt_report_info jri on a.sample_id = jri.sample_id where a.entrust_id=#{id}
